title: Agent identity: A new access model for Claude Tag
summary: Claude Tag introduces an agent identity model that allows Claude to operate autonomously in Slack channels under its own scoped identity rather than impersonating users. The system is designed for safety in multiplayer sessions, with admin governance and full auditability across different workspaces.
writeup: This video covers Claude Tag, an agent identity model that gives Claude its own scoped identity for operating autonomously in Slack channels instead of impersonating users. The distinction matters for access control and safety in multiplayer sessions where multiple people share a workspace. Key takeaways: Claude acts under a dedicated identity, admins govern its permissions, and its actions remain fully auditable across different workspaces.
